== 3...dxe4 ==
[[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...c6/2. d4/2...d5/3. Nc3/3...dxe4/4. Nxe4|'''4. Nxe4''']], retaking the pawn and defending d4, transposes into the main line 3. Nc3 variation of the Caro-Kann.
